texto: I started photographing amazing African wildlife for my own pleasure. It was like a much-needed antidote to my life in the city, which I was fast becoming allergic to.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laurent Baheux: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I started photographing amazing African wildlife for my own pleasure. It was like a much-needed a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, city, my-life pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de city e my-life.
